economic_notes: Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership engaged in resource and economic development (99% owned). Sexqeltkemc Limited Partnership (33% interest) provides business/employment opportunities within Sexqeltkemc te Secwepemc traditional territory. BC First Nations Revenue Share Limited Partnership (0.45% interest). Subsequent to year end, received $1,789,480 FNFA loan for Salmon Arm Daycare construction.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 (not 2024). Large income from investment in government business enterprise ($2,055,305) driven by 99% share in Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,976,452) + FNHA ($681,131) + FNESC ($295,747) + Province of BC ($2,754,390) + CMHC ($116,019) + Ottawa Trust Funds ($29,344) = $7,852,083; however admin recoveries and miscellaneous may include some government sources. Long-term debt includes demand loans ($1,920,893) + mortgages ($600,099). Deferred revenue was $0 at year end (prior year $200,000). Unrealized remeasurement gain of $20,238 on equity in Sk'atsin Resources LLP partnership. Modified equity method used for Sk'atsin Resources Ltd., Sk'atsin Resources LLP, Sexqeltkemc Enterprises Inc., and Sexqeltkemc Limited Partnership. Schedule of remuneration covers Chief and Councillors only; no senior staff schedule provided.
